name: Slurm Pending Reason Triage
summary: Explain why Slurm jobs are pending using read-only scheduler signals.
description: This skill helps users and support teams inspect pending Slurm jobs with squeue, scontrol, and optional sprio output so they can distinguish dependency, priority, resource, partition, reservation, and policy-related wait reasons.

inputs.name: job_id
inputs.description: Optional Slurm job id, array task id, or job step id to inspect.

inputs.name: user
inputs.description: User whose pending jobs should be listed when no job id is provided.

outputs.name: pending_queue_snapshot
outputs.description: Read-only squeue report including state, reason, priority, partition, and time limit.

outputs.name: job_detail_report
outputs.description: Optional scontrol show job output for one selected job.

outputs.name: priority_factor_report
outputs.description: Optional sprio report with scheduling priority components when available.

outputs.name: triage_prompts
outputs.description: Human-readable prompts for interpreting common pending reasons.

tests.description: Validate the manifest and example script.
Run with a pending job id and confirm it only reads scheduler state.
